1.0.0: Initial release — begin your journey as the last wielder of the Celestial Blade.
1.0.1:
• Improved game stability and performance
• Various fixes to dialogue flow and scene transitions
1.0.2:
• Your name now appears in dialogues instead of always showing "Kai"
• Lore keywords (Hanamura, Master Soren, The Void…) are highlighted — hover or tap for a short explanation
• Title screen redesigned with animated wisps, glowing title and a sword divider
1.0.3: • Speaker names now render cleanly — no more overlapping letters
1.0.4:
• Enemy names now display correctly (e.g. "Void Wraith" instead of raw ID)
• Combat skill buttons now show proper names in English and German
• Game correctly restarts after defeat — no more getting stuck
• Load game popup now shows "No saves found" instead of appearing blank
• Save slots now display the actual scene name instead of an internal key
